mapper.sql: id, energy_code, energy_name, energy_unit, convert_coef, co2_factor, category, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bs_energy WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT FROM bs_energy WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY category, sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bs_energy ( energy_code, energy_name, energy_unit, convert_coef, co2_factor, category, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{energyCode}, #{energyName}, #{energyUnit}, #{convertCoef}, #{co2Factor}, #{category}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE bs_energy
update_time = NOW(), energy_name = #{energyName}, energy_unit = #{energyUnit}, convert_coef = #{convertCoef}, co2_factor = #{co2Factor}, category = #{category}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE bs_energy SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
